zh.lifeSummary: Hugh Lowther是Robert Lowther和Margaret Lowther的兒子，於1395年出生在英國英格蘭維斯特莫藍德洛福黑。他和Mary Anne Derwentwater至少有5個兒子和2個女兒。他去世於1455年在他的家鄉享年60歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Hugh Lowther是Robert Lowther和Margaret Lowther的儿子，于1395年出生在英国英格兰維斯特莫藍德洛福黑。他和Mary Anne Derwentwater至少有5个儿子和2个女儿。他去世于1455年在他的家乡享年60岁。

nameMeanings.name: Lowther
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from a place in Cumbria, so called from the river on which it stands. The placename is of obscure etymology, perhaps of ancient Welsh origin (compare Lauder ), or from Old Norse lauthr ‘froth, foam’ + á ‘river’.

variants.name: Lawther
meanings: Scottish, northern Irish, and northern English: variant of   Lowther   and   Lauder  .

variants.name: Lauder
meanings: Scottish (Borders): habitational name from Lauder in Berwickshire, originally a name for the river Leader (itself from British lou- + dubro- ‘cleansing river’). Compare Lauderdale .

nameMeanings.name: Hugh
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French name, Hugues, Hugo, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from hug ‘heart, mind, spirit’. It was originally a short form of various compound names containing this element. This was borne by the aristocracy of medieval France, adopted by the Normans, and introduced by them to Britain. It was consistently one of the most popular boys' names in the Middle Ages in England, but fell out of favour in the 16th century until it was revived in the 20th century. Little Hugh of Lincoln was a child supposed in the Middle Ages to have been murdered by Jews in about 1255 , a legend responsible for several outbursts of anti-Semitism at various times. The story is referred to by Chaucer in The Prioress's Tale. He is not to be confused with St Hugh of Lincoln ( 1140–1200 ), bishop of Lincoln ( 1186–1200 ), who was noted for his charity and good works, his piety, and his defence of the Church against the State. Since the later Middle Ages Hugh has also been used as an Anglicized form of the Gaelic name Aodh .

en.lifeSummary: Hugh Lowther was born in 1395, in Lowther, Westmorland, England, United Kingdom as the son of Robert Lowther and Margaret Lowther. He had at least 5 sons and 2 daughters with Mary Anne Derwentwater. He died in 1455, in his hometown, at the age of 60.

fr.lifeSummary: Hugh Lowther est né en 1395, à Lowther, Westmorland, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, fils de Robert Lowther et Margaret Lowther. Il a eu au moins 5 fils et 2 filles avec Mary Anne Derwentwater. Il est décédé en 1455, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 60 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Hugh Lowther wurde 1395 in Lowther, Westmorland, England, United Kingdom, als Sohn von Robert Lowther und Margaret Lowther geboren. Er hatte mit Mary Anne Derwentwater mindestens 5 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb 1455 im Alter von 60 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Hugh Lowther è nato il nel 1395 nel Lowther, Westmorland, Inghilterra, Regno Unito come figlio di Robert Lowther e Margaret Lowther. Lui avuto almeno 5 figli e 2 figlie con Mary Anne Derwentwater. Morì nel 1455, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 60 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Hugh Lowtherは1395年にイギリスイギリスウエストモーランドロウスエルでRobert LowtherとMargaret Lowtherの息子として生まれた。彼はMary Anne Derwentwaterとの間に少なくとも5人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼は1455年に故郷で60歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Hugh Lowther(은)는 1395년 영국 잉글랜드 웨스트모를랜드 로터에서 Robert Lowther(와)과 Margaret Lowther의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 Mary Anne Derwentwater(와)과 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1455년 그의 고향에서 60세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Hugh Lowther nasceu em 1395, em Lowther, Westmorland, Inglaterra, United Kingdom filho de Robert Lowther e Margaret Lowther. Ele teve pelo menos 5 filhos e 2 filhas com Mary Anne Derwentwater. Ele faleceu em 1455, em sua cidade natal, com 60 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Hugh Lowther родился в 1395 г. в местности лоутир, вестморланд, Англия, Великобритания. Его родителей звали Robert Lowther и Margaret Lowther. У него было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 2 дочери от Mary Anne Derwentwater. Он умер в 1455 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 60 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Hugh Lowther nació en 1395, en Lowther, Westmorland, Inglaterra, Reino Unido como hijo de Robert Lowther y Margaret Lowther. Tuvo por lo menos 5 hijos y 2 hijas con Mary Anne Derwentwater. Murió en 1455, en su pueblo, a la edad de 60 años.
